lessons.key: surviving_mutant::tablayout tests must mock tabs to capture screen names not render as null otherwise tab count name changes go undetected
lessons.text: TabLayout tests must mock Tabs to capture screen names, not render as null; otherwise tab count/name changes go undetected

lessons.key: ac_gap::tab navigator acs tab count tap navigation active highlight state preservation need explicit test assertions smoke tests on mocked tabs are insufficient
lessons.text: Tab navigator ACs (tab count, tap navigation, active highlight, state preservation) need explicit test assertions — smoke tests on mocked Tabs are insufficient

lessons.key: surviving_mutant::when testing expo router tab layouts mock tabs screen to capture screen names and titles rather than mocking tabs as a no op a renders without crashing smoke test cannot detect missing or misconfigured tabs always assert the expected count names and i18n titles
lessons.text: When testing Expo Router tab layouts, mock Tabs.Screen to capture screen names and titles rather than mocking Tabs as a no-op. A 'renders without crashing' smoke test cannot detect missing or misconfigured tabs — always assert the expected count, names, and i18n titles.
